title: Destructive Moon
description: A NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that enhances the Blood Moon event with new mobs and mechanics.
body:
## Destructive Moon

Are the Blood Moons from [Enhanced Celestials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-celestials) not quite stressful enough for you? This mod aims to fix that.

Destructive Moon is an addon for Enhanced Celestials, designed to make the Blood Moon a truly terrifying and challenging event. When the red moon rises, the night will no longer be just about more monsters—it will be about something hunting you.

### Core Features

*   **The Blood Zombie**: A new, formidable foe that only spawns naturally during a Blood Moon.
    *   **Terrifying AI**: During a Blood Moon, these zombies become relentless hunters. They can break through certain blocks and place temporary `Blood Blocks` to build pathways toward their target.
    *   **Persistent Hunter**: Once a Blood Zombie has locked onto you, it will not give up easily. Its pursuit is long-lasting and unwavering.
    *   **Dormant State**: If a Blood Zombie somehow survives until morning or the Blood Moon ends, its advanced intelligence recedes, and it will behave like a standard zombie until the next Blood Moon empowers it.

*   **Control the Night**:
    *   **Blood Eye**: Craft and use this item to force a Blood Moon to occur on the upcoming night. Use with caution.
    *   **Pure Eye**: If you see a Blood Moon is scheduled and you are not prepared, this item can be used to prevent it, ensuring a peaceful night.

*   **Optional Compatibility**:
    This mod includes non-essential support for:
    *   **Apotheosis**: Blood Zombies may spawn as powerful bosses.
    *   **Champions**: Blood Zombies can appear as champion mobs with enhanced abilities.

### A Note on the Art

You might notice the textures have a certain... unique quality. That's because most of them were generated by an AI. I did attempt to draw them myself first, but the zombies drawn by the AI are scary—the ones drawn by me were just sad.

---
*This mod was created for a personal modpack, so future updates and maintenance will be based on the needs of that pack.*
